title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
